gaps.question: The role requires strong Go proficiency. Do you have any experience writing Go services or contributing to Go projects?
The JD mentions service mesh technologies like Istio or Linkerd. Have you worked with any service mesh tools?
The role involves leading incident response and post-mortems. Can you describe your experience with on-call rotations or incident management?
They prefer experience with Terraform or similar IaC tools. Have you used any infrastructure-as-code tools beyond what's on your resume?
The nice-to-have list includes gRPC and protocol buffers. Do you have experience with these technologies?

strengths: Strong Python proficiency with production-scale distributed systems experience
Extensive Kafka and event processing experience (2M+ events/hour)
Deep Kubernetes and container orchestration expertise (CKA certified)
Proven AWS experience across multiple services (EC2, ECS, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB)
Track record of mentoring engineers and establishing engineering standards
PostgreSQL and Redis expertise with demonstrated performance optimization
CI/CD and automation experience reducing deployment friction
